TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_qwalax, title = qwalax, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/qwalax} }

S.FORM: qwalax hya' ga hway bniq babaw rhzyal na yaba' utux kayal, mwah prkyas squ qqhuniq, kk'man, kwara pinbahu, ru miq qsya' ita', nanu yasa qu maki' nniqun ta' ru nnbun ta', thuzyay ta' minblaq mqyanux ru mlahang kinbahan. kinbkesan 'tayal hiya' ga skita' naha squ kinkrahu' na qwalax ru kya qu pinspngan naha, ru ini' ptnaq sinllwan naha lalu' na qwalax,smsmun ga, ki'a spayat qu lalu' nya. smn'iyal: 下大雨 krahu' ru khmay qwalax nya' mshayhway: 下小雨 cikuy ru thayhway qwalax nya' smyawkay: 絲絲細雨 zkhi' ru lhmiq qwalax nya', yan yawkay === smgiqu': 毛毛雨 yan giqu' kincipuq ru lhbaw qwalax nya' ===

qwalax hya' ga hway bniq babaw rhzyal na yaba' utux kayal, mwah prkyas squ qqhuniq, kk'man, kwara pinbahu, ru miq qsya' ita', nanu yasa qu maki' nniqun ta' ru nnbun ta', thuzyay ta' minblaq mqyanux ru mlahang kinbahan. kinbkesan 'tayal hiya' ga skita' naha squ kinkrahu' na qwalax ru kya qu pinspngan naha, ru ini' ptnaq sinllwan naha lalu' na qwalax,smsmun ga, ki'a spayat qu lalu' nya. smn'iyal: 下大雨 krahu' ru khmay qwalax nya' mshayhway: 下小雨 cikuy ru thayhway qwalax nya' smyawkay: 絲絲細雨 zkhi' ru lhmiq qwalax nya', yan yawkay === smgiqu': 毛毛雨 yan giqu' kincipuq ru lhbaw qwalax nya' ===
S.PHON: qwalax ħjaʔ ɣa ħwaj βniq βaβaw rħzjal na jaβaʔ utux kajal, mwaħ prkjas~ɕ s~ɕqu qqħuniq, kkʔman, kwara pinβaħu, ru miq qs~ɕjaʔ itaʔ, nanu jas~ɕa qu makiʔ nniqun taʔ ru nnβun taʔ, tħuzjaj taʔ minβlaq mqjanux ru mlaħaŋ kinβaħan. kinβkes~ɕan ʔtajal ħijaʔ ɣa s~ɕkitaʔ naħa s~ɕqu kinkraħuʔ na qwalax ru kja qu pins~ɕpŋan naħa, ru iniʔ ptnaq s~ɕinllwan naħa laluʔ na qwalax,s~ɕms~ɕmun ɣa, kiʔa s~ɕpajat qu laluʔ nja. s~ɕmnʔijal: *** kraħuʔ ru kħmaj qwalax njaʔ ms~ɕħajħwaj: *** ʦ~ʨikuj ru tħajħwaj qwalax njaʔ s~ɕmjawkaj: **** zkħiʔ ru lħmiq qwalax njaʔ, jan jawkaj === s~ɕmɣiquʔ: *** jan ɣiquʔ kinʦ~ʨipuq ru lħβaw qwalax njaʔ ===
